violations.text: The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the (200pp-400ppm) sanitizing solution for the (Nu-Foam/QT tablets). Observed sanitizing solution at 100 ppm. Proper sanitizing procedures reviewed. Staff changed out sanitizing solution at time of this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2025

Milk was observed held at 46 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Milk was placed in unit from colder refrigeration 2 hours prior. Milk was relocated at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/20/2023

Frozen yogurt was observed thawing on the counter. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/20/2023
The prep unit was observed with an ambient temperature of 50 degrees. Unit to not be used to store any TCS foods until serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 12/20/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution (Nu-Foam) for the 3-bay. New Violation. Correct By: 12/20/2023
